## Checklist

- [ ] Acceptance criteria from the PRD map to tests (list mapping if non-obvious)
- [ ] Docs updated where this change made them stale (`npm run docs:lint` green)
- [ ] New interactive elements have feature-prefixed `testID`s
- [ ] No new dependency — or its ADR is linked
- [ ] AI persona findings (P1/P2) resolved or rebutted in-thread
